autoRunSafeCommands.description: Whether the agent is allowed to automatically run commands marked as safe.

defaultPersona.description: The default persona loaded if none is explicitly specified.

maxInstructionSteps.description: The maximum number of logical action items/bullet points a single task's instructions should contain before being decomposed.

frictionThresholds.description: Configurable thresholds for when to log to the agent-friction-log or halt execution.

repetitiveCommandCount.description: Number of repetitive sequences of commands that flag an automation candidate.

consecutiveErrorCount.description: Number of consecutive tool errors that triggers the Anti-Thrashing protocol.

stagnationStepCount.description: Number of consecutive steps of research/analysis without modifying a file that triggers the Anti-Thrashing protocol.

baseBranch.description: The primary production/base branch, as defined in .agents/config/config.json.

sprintDocsRoot.description: The root directory for sprint-specific documentation.

sprintNumberPadding.description: Number of digits to use for padding sprint numbers (e.g., 3 digits for '040').

validationCommand.description: The command used to validate code changes before committing (e.g., 'npm run lint').

webhookUrl.description: The URL for sending sprint notifications via webhook (if configured).
